title: Citation (read interface)
description: A verifiable citation returned by get_citation. Carries a tamper-evident content hash and dated version so the citation can be re-checked later.

provision.description: Pinpoint, e.g. 'Article VI', if the citation is to a provision.

content_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the exact cited text. Re-hash the official text to verify the citation is unchanged.

version.description: Dated version this citation is pinned to.

verify_hint.description: How a caller can independently re-verify the hash against the official source.
